name: asochan-ai
description: Production-grade Claude Code skills for quality, security, and workflow automation. Works on 35+ platforms.

plugins.name: auto-test
plugins.description: Auto-detect test frameworks and run tests. Supports pytest, vitest, jest, go test, cargo test.

plugins.name: quality-rules
plugins.description: Zero Leak L2: Enforce quality rules during implementation. Shift-left quality.

plugins.name: pre-check
plugins.description: Zero Leak L1: Map blast radius, quality rules, and past incidents before starting any task.

plugins.name: security-audit
plugins.description: 3-stage security audit: pattern scan + dependency check + AI attacker analysis.

plugins.name: super-plan
plugins.description: Evidence-based design docs before code. Research, architecture, task breakdown with stakeholder approval gate.

plugins.name: rapid-build
plugins.description: Execute approved design docs with baseline reuse, config-first, parallel agents, and quality gates.

plugins.name: verify
plugins.description: Project-wide quality gate. Structure, tasks, security, git, and memory in one check.

plugins.name: multi-agent
plugins.description: Parallelize large tasks with Agent Teams. Auto-detect when 5+ independent tasks benefit from parallel execution.

plugins.name: presentation-architect
plugins.description: Design and generate professional slide decks. Brand-aware, quality-gated, multi-engine routing.

plugins.name: frontend-slides
plugins.description: HTML slide generation engine. Full inline HTML with 12 style presets. Called by presentation-architect.

plugins.name: svg-diagram
plugins.description: Generate SVG diagrams with design system support. Type x color separation.
